asset_name: Epitalon Animal Ageing and Carcinogenesis Evidence
status: PRIMARY ANIMAL PUBLICATION IDENTITIES CONFIRMED — FULL EXTRACTION OPEN
domain: Rodent lifespan, illumination regime and spontaneous tumour experiments
extracted_summary: Primary animal publications investigate lifespan and spontaneous tumours under specific experimental conditions.
The findings remain animal evidence and require full methods and statistical extraction.
limitations: Animal longevity is not human longevity.
Tumour findings do not establish human anticancer benefit or safety.
permitted_claims: Epitalon has animal ageing and tumour-incidence research.
